name: IRC_AUTO_SYNC_TO_HR_TRACKING
description: This table is used for tracking Progress and Errors in Auto Create Offers and Move to HR .

columns.Name: AUTO_SYNC_TRACKING_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: REQUEST_NUMBER
columns.Comments: To store the HDL submission request number( Latest Request Number)

columns.Name: CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: To store the Content ID returned from UCM after uploading the document.

columns.Name: CONTENT_UPLOAD_ERROR
columns.Comments: To store any Error message while uploading to Content Server

columns.Name: HDL_SUBMIT_ERROR
columns.Comments: To store any Error message while submitting a HDL Request

columns.Name: HDL_PROCESSING_ERROR
columns.Comments: To store any Error message while processing a HDL Request

columns.Name: OFFER_ACCEPT_ERROR
columns.Comments: To store any Error message while Accepting an Offer via API

columns.Name: HDL_INPUT_JSON
columns.Comments: To store Json with Input Parameters sent to HDL

columns.Name: GHR_API_INPUT_JSON
columns.Comments: To store Json with Input Parameters sent to GHR

columns.Name: GHR_API_OUTPUT_JSON
columns.Comments: To store Json with Output Parameters received from GHR

columns.Name: GHR_API_ERROR
columns.Comments: To store GHR API Error Message.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
